title: Unpacked array output port result in undefined

features.name: unpacked array output port declaration
features.description: Code should include a module output port declared as a multi-dimensional unpacked array type

features.name: unpacked array port connection via instantiation
features.description: Code should include module instantiation where an unpacked array signal is connected to an output port
